effectEN:
[AUTO](VC) Generation Break 2 (Active if you have two or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):When this unit attacks a vanguard, until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from hand to (GC).
[AUTO](VC):When your G unit Stride during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and put it on the bottom of their deck.
flavorTextEN: A tale from a distant time. The gears of time began rotating with the dragon.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you have a vanguard with "Drajeweled" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put this unit into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Once I give the signal, feel free to feast.

nameEN: Demonic Blade of Cutting Sky, Transrotor
effectEN: [ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (6) grade 0 cards], Soul Charge (6), choose six of your units, and they get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul, if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name, COST  [discard a card from hand], choose a grade 2 or less card from your soul, and call it to a (RC) in the same column as this unit.
flavorTextEN: Isn't this a little more comfortable?

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name!
Soul Charge (3). Choose one of your vanguards, and until end of turn, it gets "[CONT](VC):If your soul has ten or more cards, all of your front row units get [Power]+5000.".
flavorTextEN: The old order shall crumble here, and new rules shall be built.

nameEN: Grim Reaper Lurking in the Shadows, Zylmort
effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put this unit into your soul], look at the top two cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Demonic Lord of Hades Blaze, Baphormedes
effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [put two grade 3 rear-guards into your soul], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle for every three grade 3 cards in your soul.
[CONT](VC):This unit gets all of the following according to the number of grade 3 cards in your soul.
•Three or more - All of your grade 3 units get [Shield]+5000 and "Boost".
•Six or more - For the battle this unit attacked, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call three or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: Rejoice. I shall allow you the honor of being burnt by the hellfire of the underworld.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your soul with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, put the chosen card into your hand if it has the same card name as your vanguard, and call it to (RC) if it does not. If you put a card into your hand, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now, what appears next is―!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC) Generation Break 2 (Active if you have two or more face up G units in total on your (VC) or G zone):During your turn, if any players' rear-guard was put on the bottom of their deck this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand for the cost of Stride, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Protecting thy lord. The stories of a warrior's soul passed down through the ages.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul by the ability of your vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Put a card from your hand into your soul], choose up to three unit cards with different grades from your soul, call them to (RC), and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, all of the called units get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of your turn, COST  [put two of your rear-guards into your soul], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: It is said that Progenitor Dragon Tamers made everyone kneel before them.

nameEN: Hurry and Join, Silver Thorn Servants
effectEN:
This card can be played from the soul, and play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name!
Choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets "[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose a card with only <Pale Moon> for its clan and grade less than or equal to your vanguard from your soul, and call it to (RC)." until end of turn.
flavorTextEN:
Silver Thorn----------
That is a synonym of the everlasting "greatest stage".

effectEN:
[CONT]:You may only have up to one "Purgatory Dragon Deity, Favrneel" in your deck.
[AUTO](VC):At the beginning of your main phase, your opponent chooses one of their rear-guards, retires it, and if you did not ride this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When your opponent's rear-guards is retired during your turn, COST  [put a card from hand into soul], and draw a card.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if the sum of the grades of «Dark States» cards in your soul is thirteen or more, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], [Stand] this unit, and this unit gets drive -1 until end of turn.
[ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into soul], look at the top two cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, call it to (RC), and put the rest into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Death awaits all. It is a noble ritual that cleanses the soul.

effectEN: [ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (6) grade 0 cards], Soul Charge (6), choose six of your units, and they get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I've been waiting all this time, for the moment when I can use all my strength.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)] look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them without the same card name as a card in your soul, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: Oh undiscovered elites, let us break the records together.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand during your main phase, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your soul with grade less than or equal to your vanguard, put the chosen card into your hand if it has the same card name as your vanguard, and call it to (RC) if it does not. If you put a card into your hand, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now, appearing next is......!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (3)]!
Choose up to three cards with different grades from your drop, and put them into your soul. If your soul has four or more cards with different grades, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul by the ability of your vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The silvery glossy blade goes around, bathing in the inexhausible cheers of the crowd.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):At the beginning of your battle phase, if all of your units have "Diabolos" in their card names, until end of your opponent's next turn, you "Final Rush", and if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, "Final Burst". ("Final Burst" is also "Final Rush")
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, if you are in "Final Burst", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a column, [Stand] all of your rear-guards with "Diabolos" in their card names in that column, and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll show you! The detonating roars of our full power!!

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When a trigger unit is Soul Blast for the cost of this unit's ability, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], bind all of the [Critical] triggers Soul Blast for this cost, and perform all of the following according to the number of [Critical] triggers in your bind zone.
•One or more - Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
•Two or more - This unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
•Three or more - This unit gets drive +1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Linkage Unicalite― Engrave it. Into the star of fate.

effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When you "Final Burst", COST  [Soul Blast (2)], Counter Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):When a trigger unit is Soul Blast for the cost of this unit's ability, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (3)], bind all of the [Critical] triggers Soul Blast for this cost, and perform all of the following according to the number of [Critical] triggers in your bind zone.
•One or more - Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
•Two or more - This unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
•Three or more - This unit gets drive +1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Linkage Unicalite――engrave it; the star of fate.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you have a vanguard with "Almajestar" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose two trigger units from your drop, put them into soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Beside the Almajester sits the terrifying figure of the chimera.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if you have a vanguard with "Favrneel" in its card name, COST  [put another rear-guard into soul], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and if the sum of the grades of «Dark States» cards in your soul is thirteen or more, Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: Soul Charge (1), choose a grade 3 or less card from your soul, call it to (RC), and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Come on. It's now your turn.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Astroea" in its card name.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Remove a card with "Astroea" in its different card name from this unit from hand, soul, or drop], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets drive +1 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (3)], bind all of the [Critical] triggers Soul Blast for this cost, choose one of your rear-guards, [Stand] it, and that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000 until end of turn for every two [Critical] triggers in your bind zone.
flavorTextEN: Linkage Bicolite― Our earnest wish. The time of fulfillment.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (3)]!
Choose up to three cards with different grades from your drop, and put them into soul. If your soul has four or more cards with different grades, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: One...two...three...four...And you're the last one.

nameEN: Avaricious Demonic Dragon King, Greedon Masques
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Greedon" in its card name.
[CONT](VC):The number of cards in your damage zone for you to lose becomes seven.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Remove a card with "Greedon" in its different card name from this unit from hand, soul, or drop], look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Desire Devil" in its card name from among them, reveal it and put it into hand, and shuffle the deck.
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if your soul has three or more cards with "Desire Devil" in their card names, COST  [put three [Stand] rear-guards into soul], [Stand] this unit, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Come on, show me your cards! Showdown!

nameEN: Masquerade Demonic Jewel Dragon, Drajeweled Masques
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Drajeweled" in its card name.
• All of this card's other abilities are currently unknown.

nameEN: Karma Demonic Jewel Dragon, Drajeweled Masques
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Drajeweled" in its card name.
• All of this card's other abilities are currently unknown.

nameEN: Karmic Demonic Jewel Dragon, Drajeweled Masques
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Drajeweled" in its card name.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Remove a card with "Drajeweled" in its different card name from this unit from your hand, soul, or drop], choose two cards from your drop, put them into your soul, and this unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (4) cards with different grades], choose two of your opponent's rear-guards, retire them, choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and increase or decrease its [Power] to 1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drive check or damage check revealed a trigger unit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks a vanguard while not boosted, COST  [put another rear-guard in the same column as this unit into soul], and perform all of the following.
•Choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, retire it, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], and your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from hand to (GC) until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
This card can be played from the soul, and play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Luquier" in its card name!
Choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets "[AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose a card with only <Pale Moon> for its clan and grade less than or equal to your vanguard from your soul, and call it to (RC)." until end of turn.

Please note that there is an erratum in this card's current English image. This page is using an officially corrected text to describe it.
flavorTextEN:
Silver Thorn----------
That is a synonym of the everlasting "greatest stage".

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you played a normal order this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose two normal units from your drop, put them into soul, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO](VC):At the start of your ride phase, until end of turn, you "Final Rush".
[AUTO](VC)1/Turn :At the end of the battle this unit attacked, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (5)], [Stand] all of your front row units, and this unit gets drive -2 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This is my absolute all out no mercy full power!

effectEN:
(This card cannot be in your main deck)
[Stride]-Stride Step-COST  [Discard a grade 3 card with "Chronojet" in its card name from your hand], and Stride this card on your (VC) from face down. (When you stride, your original vanguard becomes a heart card, and this unit gets that card's [Power] and card name. At the end of the turn, return this unit face up)
[AUTO](VC) Generation Break 2:At the end of the battle this unit attacked a vanguard, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & discard two cards from hand], put this unit into your G zone face up, choose one of your vanguards with "Chronojet" in its card name, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: Roaring through space and time, the bright future manifests.

effectEN:
(This card cannot be in your main deck)
[Stride]-Stride Step-COST  [Choose one or more cards with the sum of their grades being 3 or greater from your hand, and discard them], and Stride this card on your (VC) from face down. (When you stride, your original vanguard becomes a heart card, and this unit gets that card's [Power] and card name. At the end of the turn, return this unit face up)
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks COST  [Counter Blast (1) & turn a card from G zone face up & put a rear-guard on the bottom of the deck], search your deck for up to one unit card with grade +1 of the card put on the bottom of your deck for this cost, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck. Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each face up card in your G zone.
flavorTextEN: The dream was fulfilled. You, as you are now, is proof of that.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: "Aurora Battle Princesses" are the idols that protect the galaxy.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: If there isn't enough firepower, you must make up for it posthaste.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.)
flavorTextEN: The key is guts! You'll be able to draw out more power with guts!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Put your hands in the air! Resistance would be a terrible idea!

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: If you are injured, raise your hand to inform me, alright~!
The era without prayers is a reference to the night of the world after the deities vanished.
"Cardinals" change their appearance to match the quirks of their "coffin".

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Twisting causality. That you may not do as you please.
All records and teachings from the era without prayers have been lost.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Those who manipulate "coffins" to fight. They are "cardinals".

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: The history before the era without prayers are spoken as myths.

nameEN: Star Dragon Deity of Infinitude, Eldobreath
effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - Double the [Power] and [Critical] of all of your front row units until end of turn! (Increase to double its [Power] and [Critical] when activated)
flavorTextEN: It is renowned throughout space. For how it has taken hold of unlimited power.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: We are, the builders that will build our ideal world on these lands.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Please leave this place to me!!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Replacement completed. Conductivity greatly increased.

effectEN: Additional Effect - Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn!

nameEN: Lady Healer of the Creaking World
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your opponent's attacking unit has attacked two or more times this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle. (Active if this battle is its second attack this turn or more)
flavorTextEN: The tears from the destroyed world..... With this, I'll save you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Knowledge, oh knowledge! Bestow upon me all possible knowledge!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if the attacking unit's [Critical] is 2 or greater, and its [Critical] is increased by a non-trigger effect ability or its original [Critical] is 2 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: By reversing the power of destruction, a momentary rebirth can be performed.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: The untainted cry of the firstborn, warns of the great danger that is foreseen.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: While gazing upon the planet, the future of destruction is twisted free.
His dragon records it all. The knowledge from the abyss that no one has seen.
This is my roar. Towards destruction, towards you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: From dog houses to space elevators; we at Blitz Industrial Corporation build them all.
Things like barricades, are meaningless before him.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.

flavorTextEN: Mission, start―.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: See you later.

flavorTextEN: Mission, start―.

flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to one Prison card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if one or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: We are "Aurora Battle Princesses". Criminal acts will not get past us!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted, if two or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if five or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, Counter Charge (1) or Soul Charge (3).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC/GC):If one or more of your opponent's cards is imprisoned in your Prison, this unit gets [Power]+2000/[Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Transgressors spotted. Apprehending transgressors.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), search your deck for up to one World card, reveal it and put it into your hand, and shuffle your deck.
[CONT](RC):During the battle this unit attacked or boosted, if your World is Dark Night or Abyssal Dark Night, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: The tetrahedral mechanical weapons "coffin" has the power to warp causality.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a Shadow Army token, you may have this unit get [Power]+15000 until end of turn. If you do, at the end of that battle, retire all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit, and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: It's fine, priority goes to eliminating enemies.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your World is Dark Night, Soul Charge (1). If it is Abyssal Dark Night, Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, if your World is Abyssal Dark Night, COST  [retire a Shadow Army token], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: That is a type of natural disaster. Neither guns nor swords would help.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if your Order Zone has a Set Order, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: Research on how to make good use of blast waves is ongoing.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Drawing power from the lands. Without permission, of course.

effectEN:
(After a Set Order is played, put it into your Order Zone.)
COST  [[Rest] one of your units] to play this card!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into the Order Zone, Soul Charge (3).
[CONT](Order Zone):When your opponent can normal call a rear-guard, they can perform the following:
• Soul Blast (1). If they do so, they choose one of their imprisoned cards, and call it to (RC).
• Counter Blast (1). If they do so, they choose two of their imprisoned cards, and call them to (RC).
flavorTextEN: This is the galaxy's great prison, where all the most notorious evildoers are imprisoned at.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a set order card from your hand], and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and imprison it in your Prison. Then, if three or more of your opponent's cards are imprisoned in your Prison, you draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Hold up! This is the Cosmic Security!

effectEN:
Play with this COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+30000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Red alert! Defenders, emergency dispatch!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: (This represents a Shadow Army token, and cannot be put in a deck)

[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and if your World is Dark Night, this unit gets [Shield]+5000 until end of turn. If it is Abyssal Dark Night, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Superfast charging, service available here!

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: It instinctively rejects the foreign object.
